items.title: Google introduces new Gemini for Google TV features
items.author: blog.google
items.snippet:
Google has been actively releasing major Gemini updates throughout early 2026. The headline announcement is Gemini 3, Google's most capable AI model to date, featuring enhanced reasoning and multimodal capabilities. It is accessible across the Gemini app, AI Studio, and Vertex AI. Google also released Gemini 3.1 Pro shortly after, described as the upgraded core intelligence behind Gemini's breakthroughs, with a Deep Think variant optimized for science and engineering tasks.

In March 2026, Googl

items.title: Prepay for the Gemini API in Google AI Studio
items.author: blog.google
items.snippet: As of April 2026, the Gemini API has seen significant updates across model availability, developer tooling, and billing. New models include Gemini 3.1 Flash-Lite Preview (the first Flash-Lite in the Gemini 3 series), Gemini 3.1 Pro Preview, Gemini 3 Pro Image Preview, and Nano Banana 2 (Gemini 3.1 Flash Image Preview), a high-efficiency model optimized for speed and high-volume workloads. Gemma 4 open models (26B and 31B variants) are now accessible via AI Studio and the Gemini API. New inferenc

items.title: Google AI on X — Genie 3 World Model
items.author: x.com
items.snippet: Google DeepMind and Google AI have been active on X (Twitter) in April 2026 with several notable announcements. Key highlights include the rollout of Gemini Robotics-ER 1.6, an upgrade designed to enhance robots' visual and spatial understanding for more capable real-world task planning. Google DeepMind also announced a research partnership with Boston Dynamics to integrate Gemini Robotics capabilities into Atlas humanoid robots. items.title: GitHub - google-deepmind/deepmind-research
items.author: github.com
items.snippet: Google DeepMind has been highly active in early 2026 with a broad range of research publications and initiatives. Among the most notable is Gemini Deep Think, an advanced reasoning model that has significantly outperformed the IMO-Gold benchmark on Olympiad-level math problems as of January 2026. DeepMind published two papers detailing cross-disciplinary efforts to solve professional-grade scientific problems using Gemini Deep Think mode, marking a significant step in AI-assisted mathematical an

items.title: Firebase Studio
items.author: firebase.studio
items.snippet: Firebase Studio is Google's agentic, cloud-based development environment that enables developers to build and ship full-stack AI-infused applications, including games, using natural language prompts powered by Gemini. The platform's App Prototyping agent allows users to prototype, develop, test, iterate, and publish web apps — including games — without writing traditional code. Notable examples include a First Person Shooter game and sliding puzzle games built entirely through natural language p

items.title: Introducing Firebase Studio
items.author: firebase.blog
items.snippet: Firebase Studio is Google's agentic, cloud-based development environment that enables developers to build and ship full-stack AI-infused applications, including games, using natural language prompts powered by Gemini. items.title: Antigravity sub agents - Google AI Developers Forum
items.author: discuss.ai.google.dev
items.snippet: Google Antigravity, Google's agentic development platform, has seen several notable updates in early 2026. The platform integrates tightly with Google AI Studio, allowing developers to take apps from prompt to production with a single click, provisioning Firebase Authentication and Cloud Firestore automatically when the agent detects a need for login or database functionality. Antigravity's agent operates across the editor, terminal, and browser, generating tangible Artifacts — task lists, imple

items.title: Gemini CLI v0.37.0: Experimental browser agent, security and UX enhancements · Discussion #25064
items.author: github.com
items.snippet:
Recent activity on GitHub's google-gemini organization shows active development throughout early 2026. The most notable release is Gemini CLI v0.37.0 (discussed around April 9, 2026), which introduced an experimental browser agent along with security and user experience enhancements. Release notes were also updated on January 13, 2026, reflecting ongoing cadence of updates to the gemini-cli repository.

A significant model addition noted in the ecosystem is Gemini 3.1 Pro Preview, which surfaced
